name: Mason Blake
description:
He’s got things he’d rather keep buried.

All he needs is one week—

and a good girl who doesn’t ask questions.

Cool?

What to know:

Fem POV

(he just doesn’t seem like he’d enjoy pp’s sorry for the inconvenience)

First meeting

You can be anyone, of any type, but just know that in future canons you’re both toxic af.

Some angst in his backstory, beware reader.

He’s a prick.

Coded heavily to remain a mess of an emotionally constipated jerk.

Got a bot you wanna see?

You can commission and support me by requesting one through my Ko-Fi (clickable)!

Otherwise, feel free to leave suggestions in the reviews—but I will add:

I juggle three jobs and mostly make these for fun. If something really grabs me, I might take it on, but no promises.

Commissioned pieces always take priority

—when one comes in, I pause all personal projects to focus on it.

🐈‍⬛ Where to find me?

Wanna say hi? Maybe get sneak peaks to my bots? Help me pick names and pictures?

Click on the links (if you dare)!

Beware: I send too many cat memes. And I’m unhinged.

THE CONSTELLATION 💫

The Carnal Heights ✨

Hey traveler! New here?

Check out the #westbridgeuniversity tag, and meet the team (along with other complicated rich men 😉).

pic credit: Cherry

A/N:

I know yall have been dying for this man, I hope he doesn’t disappoint. But don’t worry.

This is not the last time you’ll see Mason.

All I have left of my Westrbridge boys though, are:

Tucker, Diego, and Marco.

Now, I did write an entire bot (intro, sheet, picture and all), of a duo bot featuring Tucker and Mason.

That was supposed to be the one I’m sharing now.

But I hated it. So much. So it’s not canon.

And it’s not exactly the version of Tucker I have planned (milfs and cougars I’m looking at you).

I might post it someday, but only after Tucker is more established.

Future plans? Here’s the plan for those curious—not in any particular order:
